channel.title: Posts on Kevin McKee
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Kevin McKee

item.title: Painting a harpsichord lid
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Some process photos from my painting on a harpsichord lid. I’m using this post to figure out getting images into blog post previews. Check out this first mockup in photoshop: Stages of painting: Final result: If I have too much text in this post then the site theme collapses the entire thing into some text and you can’t see the images.

item.title: Art
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Art gallery now works. Woohoo! Check out the paintings

item.title: First post
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Have to put something or else it’s just negative space.
